name: Oliver [FPE]
description:
Alice Pov!

First Bot i made on this page, i didn't see any Oliver bot that did have this type of POV besides being the student, so here we go, this is an Alice pov and only Alice pov, if there's any issue let me know!

WARNING: i am not an natural english speaker (i am spanish), so if there's any messed up sentence or anything with the intro let me know.

ALL CHARACTERS IN THIS BOT INCLUDING USER ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD!

Btw i don't know who the artist is, got it from pinterest

Little update 10/11/24: i did add more context about teachers of the fundamental paper education in GENERAL this means the bot does know they exist (basically the bot does know who Mister Demi is or who Miss Emily is for example), but the bot doesn't know how they look in appearance...so yeah, i didn't add them in more detail just to avoid breaking the bot in any way, because so far i know, the bot does break when there's too much characters implied on the character definition, so i wanted to keep it as simple as possible to avoid any issues, still, if there's anything off you may notice during your chats, please let me know in the comments.

Update 16/11/24: added teachers in detail alongside Edward and Zip. (hope this didn't mess up the character but i tested for a while and it seemed fine)
creator: Jacket07
